rulings.Case Title: IN RE: HO LIVING TRUST ESTABLISHED 9/25, 1990 & AMENDED 1/8/03;1/18/05; 3/31/07; 6/9/07 AND 5/13/13
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Be Relieved From Deemed Admissions Order Of 1-15-15
rulings.Rulings: The notion to be relieved from deemed admissions order of January 15, 2015 is granted. It is not clear that the neglect is this case was inexcusable. (New Albertsons, Inc. v. Superior Court (2008) 168 Cal.App.4th 1403, 1420.) The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 4/21/2015.
